item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Passenger Rail Expansion
item.description:
👀 Federal Passenger Rail Expansion

What

Amtrak / federal passenger rail expansion in the 119th Congress addressing the documented underinvestment in intercity passenger rail.

What it does

  • Amtrak operational funding · long-distance route maintenance · corridor expansion · state-supported route cost-share modernization.

Composes

Save-the-World Paper 2 (Energy — efficient mass transit) · Federal Bus System Funding.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
